rows.label: qev086202_MSG0001
rows.name: Ho ho! Dance of new wares![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0002
rows.name:
We didn't dare dream you'd
find the materials so soon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Now we can unleash the wondrous magic
of our new stock upon the world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmm... the new stuff still
looks pretty standard to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0005_m
rows.name:
Only to the eyes of an
amateur, my friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0005_f
rows.name:
Only to the eyes of an
amateur, my friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ahh, but it looks like we
already have a customer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0007
rows.name:
Welcome, welcome! What
may we help you find?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0008
rows.name: So my team's taken on this job, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0009
rows.name: But the area's crammed with indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0010
rows.name:
If it's weapons you're after, I'm
afraid you've got the wrong shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0011
rows.name:
Are you nuts? I wouldn't dream of
trying to fight those things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0012
rows.name: We just wanna run 'em off, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0013
rows.name: Of course, we understand![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0014
rows.name: In that case, we have just the thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0015_m
rows.name: Don't we, Special Assistant Manager?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0015_f
rows.name: Don't we, Special Assistant Manager?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_JNK0010
rows.name: Offer Ball of Honeysmoke

rows.label: qev086202_SEL0011
rows.name:
Steer the client toward the ball of
honeysmoke, a sweet-smelling smokescreen.

rows.label: qev086202_JNK0020
rows.name: Offer High-Temperature Pot

rows.label: qev086202_SEL0021
rows.name:
Steer the client toward the
high-temperature pot, a special
piece of cookware that never cools down.

rows.label: qev086202_JNK0030
rows.name: Offer Bolt Hammock

rows.label: qev086202_SEL0031
rows.name:
Steer the client toward the electric
hammock, a comfy lounger that doubles
as a meat and fish grill.

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0016
rows.name:
Yeah...yeah, this might work.
Let's see how those bastards
react to THIS, heh heh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0017
rows.name: Thanks a million![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0018
rows.name: Ah, the simple joys of life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0019
rows.name: To craft goods and see them sold![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0020
rows.name:
To watch the customer's face
embiggen in satisfaction![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0021
rows.name: Oh, and look! Another customer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0022
rows.name:
Welcome and good day.
What may we offer you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, I... I recently
started dating someone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0024
rows.name: Hey, that's great![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0025
rows.name: Uh, thanks?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0026
rows.name:
Anyway, I wanted to
cook him dinner, but—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0027
rows.name: Cease speaking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0028
rows.name: We have the perfect item for your needs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0029_m
rows.name:
Isn't that right, Special
Assistant Manager?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0029_f
rows.name:
Isn't that right, Special
Assistant Manager?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0030
rows.name:
Okay, sure. I...think
I can make this work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0031
rows.name: Thank you. Er, again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0032
rows.name: Is that really gonna work?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0033
rows.name: That would certainly be lovely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0034
rows.name: Wait. You don't KNOW?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0035
rows.name:
How could we? We were not
the one who suggested it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0036
rows.name:
And even if it doesn't work now,
surely there must be some other
future use it will be perfect for![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086202_MSG0037
rows.name: That's...one way to look at it...[ST:wait ]
